text: I am intrigued, aware of the blend between functionality and spectacle. The glass and neon of the meeting room contrast sharply with the vibrant, idea-driven display of R+D. Here, the boundaries between observation and participation blur. I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity, but also a faint estrangement: am I merely a guest among creativity, or a catalyst for it? The exhibition’s words linger within me, echoing my own uncertainty—does clarity lie ahead, or just more questions?
